briefdescription.para: Construct with an optional AssumptionContext for assumption-aware simplification.
展开两个节点的乘积（分配律）

simplesect.para: 展开后的 AST 节点
化简后的 AST 节点

briefdescription.para: Attempt assumption-based simplification on a node.

detaileddescription.para:
Applies the following rules when an AssumptionContext is available:
sqrt(x²) → x when x is NonNegative
sqrt(x²) → abs(x) when x is Real (but not NonNegative)
abs(x) → x when x is Positive
abs(x) → -x when x is Negative

parameterdescription.para: The node to attempt simplification on

simplesect.para: Simplified node if a rule applied, or nullptr if no rule matched

briefdescription.para: 规范化访问器，合并同类项、化简数值运算、处理矩阵算术和三角函数特殊值
